name: Advance America
description_short: 3730 S 27th St in Milwaukee, WI: Advance America offers payday and title loans for quick emergency cash.
description_long:
Advance America's Milwaukee location is situated at 3730 S 27th St Ste 110, a convenient storefront accessible Monday through Saturday. In Milwaukee, WI, this branch operates from 10 AM to 6 PM weekdays, with shortened Saturday hours from 10 AM to 2 PM, and is closed Sundays. The South Side location makes it easy for Milwaukee residents to access payday and title loan services when other lending options aren't available.

At this Milwaukee Advance America branch, you can apply for short-term payday loans and title loans to cover unexpected expenses. The team can be reached at (414) 282-9539 to discuss your borrowing needs and explain the application process. Whether you need funds for medical bills, car repairs, or other emergencies, the experienced staff can walk you through available options.

When visiting Advance America in Milwaukee, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and banking information to expedite your application. This storefront serves Milwaukee's South Side community with fast approval decisions, making it a go-to option when you need money quickly. Visit or call to learn more about their current rates and terms.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Loan amounts scale from $100 (accessible) to $25,000 (title loans), accommodating different needs
Physical store locations with extended hours (until 6pm weekdays) for in-person application and service
Bilingual customer service (Spanish-speaking staff) at physical locations
4.9-star average rating across 125,448+ Google reviews indicating consistent customer satisfaction
Online application option available for all loan types
Flexible installment loan repayment terms (longer than payday loans)
cons: APR, fees, and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website—critical terms hidden from comparison shopping
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating repossession risk if payments are missed
High-interest lending model typical of payday/title industry; unsuitable for debt management or credit repair
Payday loans are short-term (2-4 weeks) and not sustainable for chronic cash flow problems
No credit-building features; loans do not help establish or improve credit history
best_for: Workers facing genuine short-term cash flow gaps between paychecks who can repay quickly
Car owners with immediate urgent expenses who have vehicle equity and reliable income to repay title loans
Consumers in financial emergencies (medical, car repair) who have no other immediate funding options
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed consumers with genuine short-term cash needs and reliable income to repay within weeks. The critical caveat is that the website withholds APR and fee information—borrowers must contact the store or call (904) 781-7075 to learn the true cost before committing, as payday and title loans typically carry extremely high interest rates (often 400%+ APR) unsuitable for ongoing financial management.
services: Installment Loans ($100-$1,000 with flexible repayment schedules)
Title Loans ($2,000-$25,000 secured by vehicle equity)
Online loan applications for all product types
Extended store hours (weekday evenings, Saturday hours)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
